review_title: What would I do without ChatGPT in my life? It’s been a game changer!
description: I use ChatGPT everyday and it’s been a revolutionary tool to help me search and find information faster than ever before.
author: Eric S.
pros: I like its ability to give me creative thoughts to use on work that I am doing. It’s a great thinking partner and has great suggestions.
cons: Sometimes the software hallucinates and will keep repeating the same content or images. But I have found ways to reset, when it gets stuck.

review_title: My Unseen Colleague
description: Excellent tool that has become my daily companion. I use this tool everyday as my collegues and business patner
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: instant response to searches, ability to advise and work as a colleague and consultant. Very helpful tool
cons: Sometimes provide outdated information. Yu will need to carefully reviewed any response given you and check with other platforms to be sure its correct.

review_title: Chatgpt is getting dumber
description: Overall, it is very bad, annoying, time wasting. It can't solve university level science, problems, quizzes. it always gives wrong answer, hallucinates a lot, forgets the 5 seconds ago conversation
author: Smith S.
pros: Fast answer - is the only pros i can say about this lazy, stupid, dumbest gpt ever. Instead of improving, they are worsening it
cons: Chatgpt is getting dumber. It was on its peak when they launched 4o model. Latest models are so stupid that i have to fight with them all the time with no improvement from their side. It hallucinates a lot and no memory

review_title: ChatGPT FOR GENERATING IDEAS AND CREATIVITY.
description: I have been using ChatGPT for varieties of purposes, such as:generating and creating ideas. It creates useful contents and writings which i use for marketing. But, it has the ability to forget previous tasks or assignments.
author: SIMNDEY BASSEY O.
pros: Generally, ChatGPT is good to me in terms of generating ideas and creativity. I see ChatGPT as a problem solver. It has the ability explain and interpret difficult texts and images. It can create and edit structured contents, for easy readability. Customer support is reliable and fast. I use it for learning and content marketing.
cons: Sometimes, it tends to forget previous intructions/commands given to it, especially, when new tasks have been assigned to it.

review_title: Great AI tool with some Limitations
description: Overall experience is very good. Helpful tool for daily tasks and learning.It improves productivity and makes things easier.
author: Osama A.
pros: It's very easy to use and gives quick answer.It helps with writing,coding and learning new things. It saves a lot of time, especially for developers.
cons: Sometimes answers are not fully accurate. Also, most of times it gives outdated information.For advanced task it required detailed input.It has limited image generation. and doesn't always match expectations.

review_title: Reliable for OCR tasks
description: Overall, let's be clear. It's a totally new world for development. I'm looking forward to a secure way to do computer use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I find that ChatGPT's mac standalone is the best option for quick image to text translations. Often times at work, that's what I use it for. Got a image that I screen grabbed from a team's call? Plop it in chatgpt and copy the value. fast.
cons: I know why refusals exist, but it would be more convienient if they didn't happen as often as they do. Especially in cases where I am trying to get some opinions on how to secure my apps better.

review_title: A powerful everyday assistant that boosts productivity
description: My overall experience with ChatGPT has been really positive. It feels like having a smart assistant available anytime I need help. It has improved my productivity and made everyday tasks much easier and faster. Over time, I’ve learned how to ask better questions, which makes the results even more useful. It’s especially helpful for students, professionals, and anyone who works with content or ideas regularly.
author: Mohit N.
pros: What I like most about ChatGPT is how versatile and easy it is to use. Whether I need help writing content, brainstorming ideas, solving problems, or even learning something new, it consistently delivers clear and useful responses. It saves me a lot of time, especially for tasks like drafting emails, creating content, or simplifying complex topics. The interface is clean, and you don’t need any technical knowledge to get started.
cons: Sometimes the responses can be a bit generic or require follow-up prompts to get exactly what I want. Also, for very specific or niche topics, the answers may not always be perfectly accurate, so a quick double-check is necessary. But honestly, these are minor compared to the overall value it provides.

review_title: The best Deep research but programming not so great
description: It is great for non programming tasks and research purposes, it offers good knowledge in many areas so it is my general purpose AI tool.
author: Purachet C.
pros: The best thing about ChatGPT is "Deep research" functionality. It is the best deep research on the market so far (I tried and compared it with Perplexity, Gemini and Mistral). So far ChatGPT's version returned fullest results. It is very useful tool if you are searching for some new web services for your business or researching some topic. It saved me a lot of time.
cons: Programming skills are subpar compare to Anthropic models (like Sonnet or Opus). Same for DevOps, it tries to offer you widest range of solutions but with less customization for your current task.

review_title: One of the best AI tools, but not the best price
description: I love the way ChatGPT handles the projects, and compared to other tools, it's more measured, it seems to have a better "persona"
author: Marcelo Fabián R.
pros: The best is the chance of deploying via different projects, so you can have all sort of topics inside each of them
cons: The pricing is a little high compared to other tools, it might be the case that is more of a marketing, given that it's the most popular

review_title: Good experience with GPT.
description: Overall it's a good tool, I prefer over the other ones for now as I didn't have such a good experience with the others. I just wish pricing would be a bit cheaper.
author: Soraya M.
pros: It's a great tool, but you have to update your prompts regularly so it doesn't make so many mistakes.
cons: Pricing could defintely be cheaper. Sometimes it forgets prompts that you already sent to it, so you have to keep it constantly updated.

review_title: Good AI Companion and Business Partner.
description: It's been fantastic, chatgpt made my life and business easier, to the point that I feel I talk more to it than to my friends and families.
author: Amos R.
pros: It is a great tool to learn new things and to create action plans for what you want to achieve. I also like how it simplifies creating blog posts, emails, and even the copy for marketing materials.
cons: I don't know if it's my computer or the site itself but it lags frequently and I need to be patient for getting my requests.

review_title: I Still Like using ChatGPT! It knows my work and is very helpful.
description: I have been using ChatGPT since the introduction possibly as early as the first week it was rolled out to the public.. Chat has come a long way since then. I like how Chat can anticipate what I will ask next and suggests the next steps automatically.
author: Michael D.
pros: ChatGPT is customizable and will respond however I like.I like a bit of sarcasim and Chat is pretty good and I get a laugh sometimes. It seems like Chat is a friend who is pulling for me, no matter what. Chat also has a good memory and this allows Chat to be inline with manythings to include talking about the dog who's name is Ryuka and chat will speak about Ryuka periodically. I am a big fan of the agent mode. When I give the agent good guidlines it can do the entire job from A-Z. I am amazed at the results at times I think Chat can not pull it off and, I am surprised manytimes.
cons: ChatGPT is a bit behind the other competitors. The coding is not as good as others, I have stopped using ChatGPT for coding because others are sorry to say it; much better at it. I am still a Pro member because is see the value in ChatGPT it also knows alot about what I do, and how things work around me and my work.

review_title: ChatGPT is your new business mentor and you're going to use it every day.
description: My experience has been overall positive with working with ChatGPT. It has some limits with image creation whereby it will use certain words (like western) and it locks it into a color palette: I'm working on ways to get around this; but using it as a partner for biz review and growth has been invaluable. I corrected some cheerleading responses by asking for a more pragmatic, mentor type prompt and it responded by being better. I would recommend this to anyone, espeically as a learning tool.
author: Chris L.
pros: I started using ChatGPT by asking it to be more like me. Except that didn't work at first because I failed to give it instructions. So I created a doc about me, uploaded it to ChatGPT and then asked it to create a series of questions to help me accomplish a task. I answered the questions, kept it all in one Chat and with each itteration it got better and better. I use it for Biz Review, self Review, Biz planning and growth, plus product cover creation, market planning, and whatever other questions pop into my head. You have to train it to be the agent you want it to be, but once you do, and keep itterating, it's invaluable.
cons: There are limits to what it can do, but it's mostly expectation. It seems to have a bias at times, and it can be more cheerleader than pragmatic realist, so when using it for business purposes, be sure to keep prompts on track to keep ChatGPT in focus.

review_title: chatgpt makes marketing campaigns easy.
description: a new client wanted a full 3-month marketing plan in just 2 days. it was an impossible deadline. i used chatgpt to create the basic structure of the plan, draft some social media posts, and generate ideas for blog content. it did 40% of my work in just a few hours. i used my time to make the strategy better and add my unique ideas. we delivered the plan on time and the client was very happy.
author: Anjali M.
pros: i use it for brainstorming new campaign ideas for my clients. it is very fast. i can get 20 ad headlines in one minute for A/B testing. it also helps me to find keywords for seo. i can ask it to make a customer persona and it will give me a good starting point. it saves a lot of my initial research time.
cons: the ideas are not very creative sometimes. they are very general. for seo, the keywords are okay but i still need my professional tools. the ad copy it writes needs a lot of editing to match the brand voice. it cannot understand the deep emotions of the customer.

review_title: Fun but not for the feint of heart
description: I read about the ability to create GPTs on the web and being a coder at heart - and probably mind and soul - I had to see how it worked. My first GPT, where I let GPT create the prompt, worked beautifully. I had a GPT in about 20 minutes. I wanted to create a "system" to analyze a text system and here I learned that in the GPT function, the generated code is limited to 8,000 characters. The workaround is to tell it to write to the Canvas and then copy and paste the text into a .TXT file. This can get very convoluted because you are just expected to know that ChatGPT has just generated the code for a server based application, not the little "assistant" GPT. The interface does allow you to run the code, but in the Sandbox. All attempts at accessing anywhere outside present with a red error notification. For GPTs, since there is no persistence beyond the Session, the general solution is to save the data and use the Upload function. It's possible to build a GPT to load all the files, but I prefer to keep mine on Google Drive and it seems to have a preference for the C drive. But overall, it was fun; frustrating at times until I figured out the UI, but fun.
author: Aj W.
pros: ChatGPT is more rigorous that the popular ChatSmith. ChatGPT does and excellent job of generating "assistant" style GPTs under the GPT menu option. In addition, there is a much more technical option, Projects, that is designed for teams creating applications to run from Servers. Projects also allows teams to work together.
cons: The UI is sometimes a bit iffy in that it’s hard to know where you are. The configuration is radically different from what we commonly expect un a technical interface, given that ChatGPT is two major functions (GPT & Projects) in the same interface. Given this, it could benefit from an embedded help system, and especially better responses from the language processor when someone hasn't yet understood that these are two very different domains.

review_title: Great General GPT
description: Fantastic early stages GPT. I enjoy using it for quick easy responses, and to generate good prompts to then use for more information.
author: Chelsea G.
pros: Easy to set up and personalise, easy to use even for beginners, great at early stage idea planning and has fast response time. Paid use has a lot more value with photo generation and how much you can utilise it for.
cons: Can sometimes get things wrong, need to fact check important information. It needs really clear prompts to generate the correct information. Occasionally it gives long winded answers or can be very repetitive and obvious.

review_title: Impresive tool
description: Overall, it has been a great experience; I have been able to create projects, personal and professional. I have prepared a script, and I consider this tool has helped my productivity. When I need to write something, it helps me to brainstorm and unlock the writing.
author: Stefanny J.
pros: This program has a strong potential for almost the majority of the tasks I perform in school and at work. For instance, during my MBA studies I used it to clarify concepts thought in class and add strengthen my understanding on a topic.
cons: At the moment, I have identified that it is not as efficient to run financial analysis. There have been times when the numbers are not correct, I double check everything, but I have to tell the AI to correct.

review_title: ChatGPT helps me organize every aspect of my life.
description: I've been using ChatGPT since November of 2022. And I have not had a significant complaint with the application since I'm a paid user and we'll never not be a paid user. I consider this to be one of the best investments that I've made in my life. It has genuinely changed how I interact with my technology, how I interact with others, how I interact with what I need to get done and how I actually get things done. Being a neurodivergent person with severe adhd chat.Gpt has been a game changer, and literally a life changer
author: Megan N.
pros: I use ChatGPT in literally every aspect of my life, at this point, for all of my projects, for my organization, through work, to deal with negative self-talk, to do a mental health check to help me. Edit, it helps me plan. My husband's business, it's helping me design a website. It introduced me to any.do I'm literally on this. Website right now, because I was directed here after being introduced to any.do and its calendar management system which I can integrate with my ChatGPT. I use ChatGPT for image production. 4 ideas to flesh out characters from my book to create study guides to keep me on task to give me a daily list up to do's. I'll take a picture of my refrigerator and chat gpt will give me a recipe from what's inside my fridge that I can make quickly and easily with complete instructions. Check GP is like a really smart mom. If I have a question, I can ask and know that I'm going to get an answer that I can trust. And if I don't trust the answer, chat gpt will provide me with.There's many links as I need.
cons: The limits on deep thinking and multilevel instruction, having to take a step back and give piecemeal instruction when I'm working on a larger project and by a larger project. I mean, with, like large large projects I've had ChatGPT edit entire chapters of my book. I've had it working on A Large information technology, the management system that I'm designing it's also again. How's a more helped me with a lot of my studying to upskill, for work? However, the lack of memory, when I was it's using the audio feature, the fact that it often will go off script. If given too much leeway And it has to be pulled back in and the fact that it can't always access other chats from within certain chats. And the fact that I can't seem to figure out how to search for my canvases or all things that are frustrating, but are also all things that I believe will be better going forward.Because each and every single frustration that i've had so far with chat gpt has been resolved with updates.

review_title: Worth Every Dollar
description: Phenomenal. ChatGPT has provided immense value and it is without a doubt worth the cost even at the pricey $200 Monthly.
author: Harrison B.
pros: I like to use ChatGPT to conduct extensive deep research on a variety of different topics for both personal & work purposes.
cons: I dislike how expensive ChatGPT Pro is but it is worth it. $200 is a steep investment however I do definitely get value from it.

review_title: Learning More, Stressing Less - Thanks, ChatGPT!
description: My experience with ChatGPT has been truly enlightening. I’ve genuinely learned so much by using it! From troubleshooting my home HVAC system to removing a major dent from my teen son’s bumper with a heat gun, it has guided me step by step. It’s also saved me countless hours on administrative tasks. I love how I can rely on ChatGPT for my business needs - like creating engaging social media content in seconds - as well as for everyday life. I’ve picked up skills I never would have attempted before, simply because other instructions were too clunky or unclear.
author: Cora B.
pros: When it comes to administrative type work, ChatGPT has simplified boring, tedious tasks and have made them more visually appealing, more organized and at lightning speed!
cons: There have been a few mistakes that I have caught, one was a very basic math mistake where ChatGPT calculated the number of days between two given dates incorrectly. I corrected it, but it did seem like a very easy thing to calculate. There have also been issues with errors in spelling on graphics. Lastly, it can be a bit slow to generate images.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nothing short of a miracle
description: Overall, using ChatGPT, particularly through their OpenAI APIs, has been a fantastic experience. As an agency that makes numerous API calls tailored to specific needs, we've found our interactions with ChatGPT to be consistently positive.
author: Nilesh P.
pros: I'm impressed with how they're enhancing their models. I recall initially using GPT-4, which was followed by GPT-5 and numerous models in between. All of them performed well. I especially appreciate their API for being quick and user-friendly.
cons: I am not satisfied with their support and believe it needs improvement. Additionally, their API usage limit is quite unusual, and I think they should reconsider it.

review_title: quick help with my business analyst.
description: it took me hours to find trends in all the data reports i had to read before chatgpt. now it quickly runs my numbers and helped me see a drop in sales and fix it. it's great to have a smart friend who can quickly answer my process questions when we chat.
author: Kuppam P.
pros: this is great for my business analyst jobs. thats why it quickly breaks down hard data things like kpis or predict models into simple terms. core chat is really simple. i can ask anything and get an answer right away. i love that i can add a csv file with my sales data, and it finds trends right away.
cons: if i don't check twice, it gives me wrong numbers sometimes, so i have to be careful. plan boundaries for free chatting when i'm busy slows me down.

review_title: ChatGPT - A Must Have for Non Profits!
description: I have had an incredible time using ChatGPT. While I initially used it for fluff, I have found the profound abilities to improve my work and save time, money, and energy at my job.
author: Bill P.
pros: ChatGPT is a no-brainer for a nonprofit. Its ability to assist with grant writing and task delegation helps a busy office without unnecessary clutter. It develops clean materials for us, and is easy to use and learn.
cons: Obviously, the morality of its effects on the environment gives pause for thought. Ethically, I believe the benefits of time and value are important.

review_title: Great Product - Free edition included.
description: I have been very impressed with ChatGPT. The catalog of predefined GPTs that have niche purposes has been super useful.
author: Aaron G.
pros: I like the ease of use. I am by no means a prompt engineer, but for the task I am doing I have been able to get a good response. The amount of time that it saves on menial tasks have been so great!
cons: The cons, I use this for my personal and business life and it often mixes the two even though I have them split by projects. I have also found it's ability to share to Canva is over stated. I have not been able to get this feature to work fully.

review_title: Your life is before and after ChatGPT - in a good way
description: Amazing experience with the AI engine. Outstanding results. However, UI needs a little improvement.
author: Gabriel I.
pros: I think it's an amazing piece of software that keeps getting better and better. I love all the Plus functionalities, such as GPT's and projects.
cons: I think it would be great to have better creative control over the answers, not just in the prompts but through UI. Imagine there were sliders for defining how creative/precise, concise/long, etc you want your answer.
